metadata.description: Dbinky's skill set for Claude Code

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Multi-persona PR review pipeline with sequential AI agent personas.

plugins.name: ralph-plan
plugins.description: Automate ralph loop setup from branch changes or user-specified scope.

plugins.name: plan-to-ralph
plugins.description: Interactive Q&A to generate ralph-o-matic loop files customized for your project.

plugins.name: feature-pipeline
plugins.description: End-to-end feature automation — interactive brainstorm for spec and design, then automated alignment, planning, implementation, ralph refinement loop, and PR review.

plugins.name: auto-ralph-prep
plugins.description: Automatically generate ralph loop files (RALPH.md, focus-areas.md, gaps-identified.md) from spec and design docs without interactive Q&A.

plugins.name: auto-ralph-submit
plugins.description: Non-interactive submission to ralph-o-matic with sensible defaults — pre-flight checks, auto-commit, auto-push, and Teams notification.

plugins.name: spec-to-design
plugins.description: Automated pipeline from spec+designs through alignment, planning, plan alignment, and draft implementation — runs steps 3-6 with zero interaction.

plugins.name: curating-code
plugins.description: Analyze a codebase for vibe-coding cruft — dead code, excessive complexity, duplication, and inconsistent patterns — then selectively fix issues to produce clean, senior-engineer-quality code.
